passiveAbilities.name: Blind Faith
passiveAbilities.description: This character may not take Harvest or Jog actions unless there is a friendly model within 4".

passiveAbilities.name: Censer Chain
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Predictable Combatant
passiveAbilities.description: During a round of combat, before each player selects their combat card, you must reveal your hand to your opponent.

activeAbilities.name: Righteous Fury
activeAbilities.description: This character gains +3 energy, +1 Melee Stat, +1 Arcane Stat and +1 to Melee Dmg until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Haul In
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move target 2" directly towards this model.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds. Then if this character is not slain all other models within 3" are moved 2" directly towards this model.

signatureMove.name: Entangle
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is within 1” then it cannot play End Step Effects. If the enemy is within 1" it suffers 1 Wd, loses 1 energy and suffers -2 Melee Stat until end of turn.
